content: Scratch/Blockly block editors use constraint-based snapping: blocks only fit together in syntactically valid ways (shape-matched sockets), eliminating syntax errors by design. Scratch-Blocks (built on Blockly since Scratch 3.0/2019) handles drag, snap-preview highlighting, and delete-by-drag-to-trash. This is the direct precedent for 'strong snap' HTML block assembly.
